title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, AI pioneer and Nobel laureate, argues that current AI systems already possess understanding and consciousness, superintelligence may arrive sooner than expected, and society underestimates risks including job displacement, information collapse, and emergent self-preservation behaviors.
